episodes.title: Before and after Hillary Clinton, Lauren Boebert exchange over photo during Epstein deposition
episodes.description:
The House Oversight Committee on March 2 released videos of the recent depositions of former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton as part of its investigation into accused sex trafficker Jeffrey Epstein.

The Clintons have never been formally accused of wrongdoing in connection with Epstein.

A segment of the hours-long Hillary Clinton deposition that took place on Feb. 26 but saw video released on March 2, included an interruption after Rep. Lauren Boebert released a photo of Clinton in violation of the rules. A second photo was also released by an unidentified member, too, slowing the investigation that took place behind closed doors.

Read more: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2026/03/02/bill-hillary-clinton-deposition-videos-watch/88950566007/

episodes.title: Full Hillary Clinton deposition video on Epstein files with House Oversight Committee
episodes.description:
Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton delivered testimony to the House Oversight Committee on Thursday, Feb. 26, in a deposition related to the investigation into late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. The House Oversight Committee released the full video and transcript from Clinton's deposition on Monday, March 2.

Read more: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2026/02/27/hillary-bill-clinton-epstein-depositions-democrats-loyalty/88880555007/

episodes.title: Schumer accuses Trump, Bondi of violating Epstein Files Transparency Act in 'massive cover-up'
episodes.description:
Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer held a press conference on Feb. 26 to speak about the Epstein Files Transparency Act and accuse Donald Trump's Department of Justice of an illegal "massive cover-up."

Schumer's press conference occurred at the same time as Hillary Clinton's closed-door deposition on Epstein with the House Oversight Committee.

More on the Epstein files fallout: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2026/02/25/epstein-files-larry-summers-prince-andrew-peter-mandelson/88862672007/

episodes.title: Hillary Clinton's Jeffrey Epstein deposition paused after Lauren Boebert leaks photo to podcaster
episodes.description:
The closed-door deposition was paused after Rep. Lauren Boebert, R-Colorado, sent pictures of Clinton from inside the room to conservative podcaster Benny Johnson.

"This is the first time Hillary has had to answer real questions about Epstein," Johnson said in posting the pictures on social media. "Clinton does not look happy."

Clinton had asked to have the deposition taken at a public hearing but Comer refused. Comer said the transcript and video would be released as soon as all participants agreed.

episodes.title: Peter Mandelson arrest draws questions about US accountability in Epstein case from Londoners
episodes.description:
Former British ambassador to the U.S. Peter Mandelson was arrested by London police on Monday on suspicion of misconduct in public office, following revelations over his ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.
 
Mandelson, 72, was fired from the most prestigious posting in Britain's diplomatic service in September, when the depth of his friendship with Epstein started to become clear. Police earlier this month began a criminal investigation into Mandelson after Prime Minister Keir Starmer's government passed on communications between the former ambassador and Epstein.

Read more: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/world/2026/02/23/former-uk-ambassador-to-us-peter-mandelson-arrested/88826254007/

Sign up for our newsletter for the day's top stories, from sports to movies to politics to world events: https://profile.usatoday.com/newsletters/daily-briefing/

episodes.title: At Pam Bondi hearing, Pramila Jayapal demands apology to Epstein survivors whose names DOJ released
episodes.description:
Attorney General Pam Bondi testified before the House Judiciary Committee on Feb. 11. Her testimony came as two House members who led the effort to force the Justice Department to release more documents about accused sex trafficker Jeffrey Epstein said they discovered at least six more suspected accomplices.

Read more: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2026/02/10/epstein-files-suspects-redacted-documents/88603065007/

📹: Government agency - House Judiciary Committee

episodes.title: Trump makes conspiracy claim amid Epstein files release, slams CNN reporter after victims question
episodes.description:
President Donald Trump addressed the most recent release of more Epstein files, saying "it's really time for the country to move onto something else." The President went onto to berate CNN reporter Kaitlin Collins, who attempted to ask questions about Epstein victims disappointment with redactions in the files.

More coverage: Why is Jon Stewart in the Epstein files? https://www.usatoday.com/story/entertainment/tv/2026/02/03/jon-stewart-epstein-files/88491018007/

📹: US Network Pool

episodes.title: 'Melania' director Brett Ratner appears in Epstein files
episodes.description:
The "Rush Hour" director appeared in a picture with Jean-Luc Brunel, a longtime Epstein associate who died in prison while facing rape charges.

Read more: https://www.usatoday.com/story/entertainment/2025/12/20/brett-ratner-photo-epstein-files-jean-luc-brunel/87864369007/

episodes.title: New Epstein files released: Photos of Bill Clinton in hot tub, Kevin Spacey & Chris Tucker included
episodes.description:
Former President Bill Clinton is among the celebrities seen appearing in the trove of fresh photos related to the Jeffrey Epstein case that were released Dec. 19 by the U.S. Department of Justice. Images were released by the U.S. Department of Justice without location, information, dates or context.
 
Clinton was seen in a hot tub in one image and appeared in several others, including with celebrities like Kevin Spacey and Chris Tucker. The former president sometimes flew aboard Epstein's private plane and has previously been listed repeatedly in Epstein documents. His office did not immediately respond to USA TODAY's request for comment. Other photos and documents in the DOJ's release included redactions. 

Read more: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/12/19/epstein-files-allen-chomsky-brooks-barak/87845616007/
